author: jsign
content:
Hey, new release of zkEVM specs & tests: [zkevm@v0.3.0](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-spec-tests/releases/tag/zkevm%40v0.3.0)

TL;DR:
- One spec change: a (simple) bytecodes execution witness optimisation case.
- 117 newly created tests specifically designed to surface border cases for `bytecodes` and `headers` field in the execution witness. (`state` tests coming next)
- The release is based on `bal@5.4.0`. The main goal is to make EL clients' lives easier, since their primary working branch is likely based on the latest BAL devnet, so active EIPs are more predictable.

More details in the release description.
